evidence_summary: Metadata-only note: this entry adds biographical context around Zhang Ailing's elite but turbulent family background, wartime return to Shanghai, later migration to Hong Kong and Los Angeles, critical reputation in modern Chinese literature, and the recurrent connection critics make between family turmoil, social decay, and the emotional climate of her fiction.
